settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage Admin Console display language, permissions, and operators.
settings.languageDescription: The saved language applies only to the current Admin operator.
settings.managementBody: Create operators, change roles, deactivate operators, and rotate setup tokens.

login.title: Admin Login
login.heading: Log in with passkey
login.description: Sign in to Admin Console with a registered passkey.
login.cardDescription: Start safe passkey authentication without exposing account existence.
login.error: Passkey authentication failed. Check your input and try again.
login.verified: Login verified. Redirecting to Admin Console.

dashboard.title: Admin Console
dashboard.description: Review customer account status and the latest audit events.
dashboard.recentAccountsDescription: The five most recently created accounts.
dashboard.recentAuditDescription: Review the latest admin operations with their outcomes.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Search customer accounts and review suspension status and passkey counts.
accounts.emptyDescription: No accounts match the current filters.
accounts.createDescription: Create an account through the Admin backend so Product account rules and audit logging are applied.
accounts.errorForbidden: This operator is not allowed to perform that action.
accounts.errorInvalid: Check the email address and try again.
accounts.errorDuplicate: An account with this email already exists.
accounts.errorNotFound: The requested account could not be found.
accounts.errorUnavailable: The Admin backend is temporarily unavailable.
accounts.errorUnknown: The operation could not be completed.

accountDetail.suspendDescription: This customer account will be suspended.
accountDetail.restoreDescription: This customer account will be restored.
accountDetail.suspendError: Enter a suspend reason between 1 and 500 characters.
accountDetail.restoreError: Enter a restore reason between 1 and 500 characters.
accountDetail.lifecycleDescription: Suspension and restoration reasons are stored in the audit log.

passkeyList.title: Passkeys
passkeyList.emptyDescription: This account has no registered passkeys.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Filter admin operations by operator, action, and date.
audit.emptyDescription: No audit events match the current filters.

operators.title: Operators
operators.description: Manage Admin Console operators and one-time setup tokens.
operators.addDescription: Share the setup token that is displayed once after registration.
operators.setupTokenDescription: Share this value securely with {email} once.
operators.updateRoleError: Check the input for the role update.

passkeys.title: Admin Passkeys
passkeys.heading: Passkey management
passkeys.addSuccess: A passkey was added on this device.
passkeys.addError: Could not add the passkey. Check your authentication state and try again.
passkeys.deleteError: Could not delete the passkey. The final passkey cannot be deleted.
passkeys.registeredDescription: The final passkey cannot be deleted to prevent lockout.
passkeys.emptyDescription: Add a passkey to continue signing in.
passkeys.deleteDescription: After deletion, this passkey cannot sign in to Admin Console.

setup.title: Admin Bootstrap
setup.heading: Register the first administrator
setup.description: Use this only in environments without any Admin operators. Register the bootstrap secret and first passkey.
setup.cardDescription: Create the first admin operator and login passkey.
setup.error: Initial setup could not be completed. Check the input and passkey registration operation.
setup.operatorExists: An Admin operator already exists. Use the login page to authenticate.
setup.unavailable: Initial setup is currently unavailable. Contact an administrator.

operatorSetup.title: Operator Setup
operatorSetup.heading: Set up your operator account
operatorSetup.description: Use the setup token from an admin to register a passkey on this device.
operatorSetup.cardDescription: The one-time token is consumed when registration completes.
operatorSetup.error: Setup could not be completed. Check the token expiry and passkey registration operation.
